claims.text: The new scarce skill is writing specifications that fully capture intent

anchors.label: Sean Grove, OpenAI
anchors.quote: the new scarce skill is writing specifications that fully capture the intent

claims.text: Structured communication is the bottleneck once execution is cheap
The most valuable programmer communicates most effectively

anchors.label: Sean Grove, OpenAI
anchors.quote: the person who communicates most effectively is the most valuable programmer.

claims.text: Code is a lossy projection from the specification

anchors.label: Sean Grove, OpenAI
anchors.quote: code itself is actually a lossy projection from the specification.

claims.text: Engineers bring most value through communication, not code alone
claims.caveats: Book synthesis claim — anchored to this talk as primary evidence.

anchors.label: Sean Grove, OpenAI
anchors.quote: Code is sort of 10 to 20% of the value that you bring. The other 80 to 90% is in structured communication.
